---
layout: page
title: build
permalink: /build/
---

This site is built using rmarkdown, knitr, and jeykll.is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

```{r mtcarplot, echo=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(mtcars, aes(x = mpg, y = wt))+
  geom_point()


```
